items.title: Two fouls on KAT, Spurs getting great looks, Knicks 1-for-4 from the floor with two turnovers, with the last one leading to a pick-six dunk for Julian Champagnie. 12-2 Spurs less than three minutes in — a fourth straight bad start for the Knicks in these Finals.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: Two fouls on KAT, Spurs getting great looks, Knicks 1-for-4 from the floor with two turnovers, with the last one leading to a pick-six dunk for Julian Champagnie. 12-2 Spurs less than three minutes in — a fourth straight bad start for the Knicks in these Finals.

items.title: NYC native Julian Champagnie on the atmosphere at Madison Square Garden:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
NYC native Julian Champagnie on the atmosphere at Madison Square Garden:

"The initial reaction of just running out there, seeing all the celebrities, the fans, how loud it was, the music, it was definitely a surreal feeling that I'll carry for life. ... It was pretty cool."

items.title: Jalen Brunson was able to chill out in the corner guarding a stagnate Julian Champagnie far too often last night resulting in the other Spurs trying to go at Hart, Bridges, and OG and struggle to create an advantage.
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
Jalen Brunson was able to chill out in the corner guarding a stagnate Julian Champagnie far too often last night resulting in the other Spurs trying to go at Hart, Bridges, and OG and struggle to create an advantage.

Maybe Spurs need five guys with their drivers license on the court together.

items.title: Josh Hart just said that he was surprised at the start of Game 1, after days of preparing for being guarded by Wemby from the jump, when he brought the ball up and saw that Julian Champagnie was guarding him.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt:
Josh Hart just said that he was surprised at the start of Game 1, after days of preparing for being guarded by Wemby from the jump, when he brought the ball up and saw that Julian Champagnie was guarding him.

"I was about to call timeout, and tell them to switch."

items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Julian Champagnie on Josh Hart's 3-point, 15-rebound, 6-assists, 4-steal, 1-block outing:

JULIAN CHAMPAGNIE is shooting .414 from three so far in this Spurs run.

He’s .687 from three in the last 2 games: Game 7 against the Thunder and tonight against the Knicks. 😳

Reminder: the Sixers waived him so they can have Matt McClung represent them at the dunk contest 😭

#NBA

items.title: Jalen Brunson came up visibly favoring and holding his right knee after colliding with Harrison Barnes on that last Julian Champagnie 3. Noticeably limping on the next possession, and after another Spurs bucket, he's checked out of the game.

media.title: Julian Champagnie's hard work pays off with NBA Finals - Andscape
media.description: Julian Champagnie, undrafted in 2022 and waived in 2023, is now a starter for the San Antonio Spurs and set to face his hometown Knicks in the Finals.

items.title: Playing in the NBA Finals in NYC is a “dream come true” for the #Spurs’ Julian Champagnie, who had to “dig deep” to survive on Brooklyn’s blacktop courts.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Playing in the NBA Finals in NYC is a “dream come true” for the #Spurs’ Julian Champagnie, who had to “dig deep” to survive on Brooklyn’s blacktop courts.

“It's kind of eat or be eaten, kill or be killed, he said.

On the forward’s love for his hometown:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: 'How 'digging deep' in Brooklyn molded the Spurs' Julian Champagnie
media.description: The New York City native says it's a "dream come true" to face the Knicks in the NBA Finals with at least two games at Madison Square Garden.

items.title: Edwin Gonzalez, Julian Champagnie's coach at Brooklyn's Bishop Loughlin Memorial, on how excited he was watching Game 7:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Edwin Gonzalez, Julian Champagnie's coach at Brooklyn's Bishop Loughlin Memorial, on how excited he was watching Game 7:

"When his shots didn't go in, I cursed at the TV. I was coaching him on the TV, Put a little more arc on your shots. You'll make the next one," he told me.

items.title: Julian Champagnie seemed very relaxed in the locker room before the game, but that's how he is pretty much all the time.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Julian Champagnie seemed very relaxed in the locker room before the game, but that's how he is pretty much all the time.

Still, he's coming up big in a pressure-packed setting with 17 points powered by 5 of 6 from deep in 23 minutes.

Also note that defensive rebound he snagged before his last 3.

items.title: Julian Champagnie:
items.author: Nate Duncan
items.body_excerpt:
Julian Champagnie:


Regular-season points per GAME: 11


First-quarter points tonight: 13


The only other player with such a low scoring average to score so much in a conference finals or NBA Finals first quarter (play-by-play era) is Meyers Leonard in 2019.
